description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a robust, angular design with a wide, stable black base and a slanted support column leading up to a rectangular housing. The front face is dominated by a vertically oriented touchscreen display, framed by a thick, light gray bezel. The display appears to show a colorful user interface, likely for payment or ordering services, and is positioned at an ergonomic height for standing users. The structure is constructed primarily from metal and plastic, giving it a modern, durable appearance suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The rear and sides are solid and unadorned, with visible fasteners and a matte finish, emphasizing security and tamper resistance. The overall build suggests weather resistance and ease of maintenance, making it ideal for outdoor or semi-outdoor placement.
description: A sturdy, modern self-service payment kiosk with a large touchscreen display set in a light gray frame atop a black angled pedestal, designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display with a light gray bezel and the main user interface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled support column and the protruding display housing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, faceted back panel with visible fasteners and no interactive elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the angled support and display housing, with no visible controls.
attribute_display_screen: A single large, vertically oriented rectangular touchscreen is centered on the front, surrounded by a thick light gray bezel, displaying a colorful user interface.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is likely integrated below or beside the touchscreen, possibly including a card reader slot and NFC tap area, though specific details are not clearly visible.
attribute_branding_or_logo: No visible branding or logo is present on any side of the object.
attribute_instructional_signage: No explicit instructional signage is visible, but the display screen shows a user interface with icons and text.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small slot below the touchscreen may serve as a receipt dispenser, accessible from the front.
